settings.heading: Membership
settings.description: Become a valued member and enjoy amazing perks every time you dine with us.  Earn points, unlock rewards, and indulge in the best pasta experience!

settings.heading: Sign Up for Free
settings.description: Become a member by registering online or at our restaurant. Choose from three unique membership tiers to match your pasta passion.

settings.heading: Earn Points
settings.description: For every $1 spent, you earn 1 point. The more you dine, the more rewards you unlock!

settings.heading: Redeem Your Rewards
settings.description: Use your points to get discounts, free dishes, and exclusive experiences.
Joining is easy! Follow these three simple steps:

settings.heading: Bronze
settings.content:
• 5% discount on all pasta dishes every Sunday
  • Monthly newsletter with pasta recipes
  • Early access to seasonal promotions

settings.heading: Silver
settings.content:
• 10% discount on all pasta dishes
  • Free appetizer with every order above $30
  • Exclusive invitation to pasta-making workshops
  • Monthly newsletter with premium recipes

settings.heading: Golden
settings.content:
• 15% discount on all pasta dishes
  • Free dessert with every order above $30
  • VIP reservation priority
  • Personalized pasta recommendations
  • Complimentary bottle of wine on special occasions

settings.heading: Birthday Surprises
settings.description: Receive a complimentary dessert or a bottle of wine on your special day.

settings.heading: Early Access to New Dishes
settings.description: Be the first to try our seasonal and limited-time pasta creations.

settings.heading: Personalized Recommendations
settings.description: Let our chefs surprise you with dishes based on your taste preferences.

settings.heading: Members-Only Events
settings.description: Get invites to pasta-making classes, wine tastings, and chef’s table experiences.

settings.heading: Members-Only Perks
settings.description: Being a member isn’t just about discounts – it’s about enjoying exclusive VIP benefits:

settings.heading: Join Now & Start Earning Rewards!
settings.description: Sign up today and enjoy exclusive perks, VIP treatment, and the best pasta experience! Earn 25 points just for signing up.
